mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.is_on_sale = 1 ORDER BY p.sales DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_product WHERE is_on_sale = 1
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.is_on_sale = 1 AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.craft_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.sales DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_product WHERE is_on_sale = 1 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR craft_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.artisan_id = #{artisanId} AND p.is_on_sale = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (name, description, category_id, artisan_id, images, price, original_price, stock, region, craft_type, story, craft_process, tags, is_on_sale) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{artisanId}, #{images}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{region}, #{craftType}, #{story}, #{craftProcess}, #{tags}, 1)
